title: deepslate dubble
description: doubles the resources from deepslate variants
body:
this mod makes it so that deepslate ores drop twice as much as normal ores
so that people won't feel cheated when they (for example) find a one block ore vein of diamonds (this mod works great too if u use fortune).
really handy for multiplayer.

everything has a 1 in 5 chance to drop double:

- diamonds: 2
- raw iron: 2
- raw gold: 2
- emerald: 2
- coal: 2
- redstone: 8-12
- copper: 2-10
- lapis: 8-18

now as a datapack!
